headline: Woman Says 'I'm Giving Up Dating' After 47 Bad Hinge Dates In One Year
summary: The spreadsheet she kept of 'red flags' is now being studied by sociologists.
fullBody: Amanda Ghostingle has officially retired from dating after 47 first dates in 365 days. 'The final straw was a man who brought his mother to the date,' Ghostingle said. Her color-coded spreadsheet of 'icks' includes categories like 'lied about height,' 'chewed too loudly,' and 'had a political opinion about my haircut.' She's now dating her couch and reports that 'it's the healthiest relationship I've ever had.'
